Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages

Class MessageToServer

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.Message
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageToServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ChooseObjectiveMessage, ChooseTokenMessage, CreationMessage, DrawAvailableMessage, DrawDeckMessage, JoinMessage, LobbyRequestMessage, PingToServer, PlaceMessage
public abstract class MessageToServer extends Message
Abstract class that represents a message that is sent to the server

      Decodes the message and executes the action that it represents
